description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark gray roof and white brick exterior walls. The front facade features a gated entryway with a small garden area and a balcony with glass or acrylic railings above. Large vertical windows dominate the upper story, providing ample natural light. On one side, there is a private balcony with a hot tub, outdoor seating, and tall ornamental plants, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The rear and one side of the house are mostly solid walls with minimal openings, emphasizing privacy and security.
description: A modern two-story white brick house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, a gated entry, and a balcony featuring a hot tub and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side balcony with a hot tub, glass railings, sliding doors, and tall plants, highlighting the leisure area.
description_view_1: View 1 provides an angled look at the balcony, hot tub, and the side wall, emphasizing the outdoor amenities and privacy.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front facade with a gated entry, garden beds, and a row of large vertical windows and balcony above.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the plain side wall with no windows or features, emphasizing the solid, private construction.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a small garden, modern door, and balcony above; no porch or columns.
